flow_points: Oman's innings started poorly, losing 4 wickets for only 24 runs in the Powerplay.
This early collapse prevented Oman from building a stable foundation.
B Muzarabani led Zimbabwe's bowling attack with a crucial spell of 3 wickets for 17 runs.
B Evans also delivered a strong performance for Zimbabwe, taking 3 wickets for 18 runs.
R Ngarava further contributed for Zimbabwe with 3 wickets for 21 runs.
Sikandar Raza added a wicket for 17 runs to maintain pressure on Oman.
Zimbabwe had a strong Powerplay in reply, scoring 43 runs for 2 wickets.
BJ Bennett anchored Zimbabwe's chase with 48 runs from 36 balls.
Bennett's innings was pivotal, contributing 45.3% of Zimbabwe's total runs.
Sufyan Mehmood was Oman's most impactful bowler, taking 2 wickets for 12 runs.
Zimbabwe secured a comprehensive victory by 8 wickets.
